signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Holding Fragilely as of April 15 Amid Strait of Hormuz Blockade and Calls for Resumed Talks | NO | MED confidence**

A US-Iran ceasefire, announced on April 8 after 40 days of hostilities, remains in effect but is described as fragile, with no new confirmations, announcements, or resolutions today that would shift prediction markets.[1][2][3] US maintains a naval blockade on Iran

signals.headline: Bitcoin Tests $71K Support | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Tests $71K Support | YES | HIGH confidence**
Bitcoin tested $71,636 support levels on April 12 with extreme fear sentiment (Fear & Greed Index at 16), while accumulation addresses added 2,340 BTC over 72 hours, suggesting institutional interest at current levels[4].
